DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. AT OR BEFORE NOON ON 6/3/11, DEFENDANT MUST SUPPLEMENT HIS RESPONSES TO FULLY ANSWER FOR INTERROGATORIES 71.7, 77.1(A) AND 81.1(A) TO (C) AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 11 AND 12. THE MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. THE COURT DID NOT AWARD SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED (301/PJB)

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDRES SANCHEZ OF MC HALL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 512-9865 EXT. 5 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions. At or before noon on 6/3/11, defendant must supplement his responses to fully answer For Interrogatories 71.7, 77.1(a) and 81.1(a) to (c) and Special Interrogatories 11 and 12. The motion is otherwise denied. The court did not award sanctions. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
